arts.ttl: Fulham v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates on the 2pm BST kick-off Owen wrong to claim winning title not enough, says Slot Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Mail Daniel Ah, one sec, here’s Arne Slot. His tracky bums are very tight; the least said about Jamie Carragher’s brown suede brogues the better. Slot says he’s got two very good left-wingers to choose from, and this time he went for Gakpo not Diaz. At right-back, meanwhile, Curtis Jones played well against Everton, he thinks, and he can only see how he does against very different opponents by picking him. But Conor Bradley is on the bench, and will also get minutes. Continue reading...
